improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners and traders. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business professionals. Try three free searches today.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines and social platforms rely on meta descriptions and OG tags to generate previews. A clear, benefit-driven meta description improves click-through rates from search results, while complete OG tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for a B2B audience. The copy highlights the free trial, Claude-powered technology, and core value props without inventing claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers to your toughest business questions. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access with a Gideon membership."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product by name and clearly defines what it does, building brand recognition. The subheading leads with the core benefit (instant answers), highlights the risk-free trial offer (three free searches), and creates a natural path to conversion (membership). It avoids vague promises and speaks directly to the target audience of business owners and traders.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and benefits, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the critical paywall moment.
